title: New Frontiers in China's Military Organisation — ICS Wednesday Seminar
description: Invited Wednesday Seminar lecture on the PLA's dissolution of the Strategic Support Force and the creation of the Information Support, Cyberspace, and Aerospace Forces. Chaired by M.V. Rappai; an official executive summary was published by ICS.

title: Book Release: Taming The Dragon — A Manifesto for a New Modus Vivendi with China
description: Panel discussion at the Pune International Centre launch of the co-authored volume proposing a new modus vivendi framework for India's China policy.

venue: All India Conference of China Studies
description: Panellist on the state of the field of Chinese studies in India at the Institute of Chinese Studies' flagship annual conference.
